name: Maple Syrup Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the maple syrup and whipping cream.
2. Blend in the cornstarch and cold water until smooth.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Pour the filling into the baked pie shell.
6. Let cool until set.
SERVES 6-8
